content.full_text:
December 17, 2003

Charles H. Bell, Jr.
Bell, McAndrews, Hiltachk & Davidian, LLP
455 Capitol Mall, Suite 801
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-236

Dear Mr. Bell:

This letter concerns your request for written advice on behalf of Trent Benedetti, Treasurer for Assemblyman Abel Maldonado’s campaign committees. After a careful review of the facts you submitted, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. Your questions involve analysis of facts, which have already occurred, such that issuing written advice at this time would relate to past conduct and would be inappropriate. (Regulation 18329(c)(4)(A) and (G), copy enclosed.)

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

By: Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Enclosure
LM:jg
